data.title: Merlin, Inc. Announces $80 Million PIPE Investment to Accelerate Program Execution and Unlock New Growth Opportunities
data.description: On April 29, 2026, Boston-based company Merlin, Inc. (Nasdaq: MRLN), known for their advanced autonomous flight technology, revealed a new development. The company has finalized a securities purchase agreement with a current institutional shareholder to secure $80 million in equity funding through a private investment in public equity ("PIPE"). This move signifies a significant step for Merlin as they continue to advance their pioneering technologies.

data.title: Student Entrepreneurs from 15 Countries to Compete at USD's Fowler Global Social Innovation Challenge
data.description: On April 29, 2026, The University of San Diego (USD) announced its hosting of the final round of the 2026 Fowler Global Social Innovation Challenge (GSIC) on May 2, 2026. This global event will feature student entrepreneurs from 15 countries who will present their business models in hopes of winning.

data.title: ALIRT Insurance Research: U.S. Life Insurers Continue to Grow Their Exposure to Less Liquid Bonds
data.description: Earlier this month, a recent study by ALIRT Insurance Research revealed an increasing exposure of U.S. life insurers to less liquid bond investments. The study emphasizes both the strategic advantages and the emerging financial risks connected to this shift in portfolios. The report sheds light on the growing trend within the industry.

data.title: Abnormal AI strengthens team to enhance Behavioral AI platform with more members joining.
data.description: A recent study reveals that around 30% of the population in the country is facing food insecurity due to the ongoing economic crisis. The research shows that approximately 20 million people are struggling to access an adequate amount of food on a daily basis. This issue has been exacerbated by the high unemployment rate, with over 10% of the workforce currently jobless. The government is being urged to take immediate action to address this growing problem and ensure that all citizens have access to sufficient and nutritious food.

data.title: InMobi Launches “Ad Experiences” With FOSSIL as First Brand Partner
data.description: In San Mateo, California, InMobi, a worldwide technology leader focusing on agile commerce and advertising, has revealed the official introduction of InMobi Ad Experiences.

data.title: Alaris Acquisitions Appoints Tony Leonard as Managing Director of Business Development
data.description: A prominent M&A advisory firm, Alaris Acquisitions, based in Charlotte, North Carolina, recently named Tony Leonard as the managing director of business development. The firm specializes in facilitating mergers and acquisitions and plays a significant role in the industry. This strategic move is aimed at enhancing their business development efforts and improving their market presence. Leonard's appointment signals the firm's commitment to growth and expanding its services.

data.title: Tour24 Announces All-In Pricing with Engrain to Power Fee Transparency using ToriAI
data.description: In Boston, Tour24, a prominent self-guided tour provider in multifamily housing, has revealed an extended collaboration with Engrain, a top player in map-based data visualization for rental properties. This enhanced integration introduces advanced features through ToriAI, aiming to provide comprehensive pricing, fee information, and leasing insights seamlessly within the self-guided tour process. ToriAI, operating on Tour24’s established self-guided tour platform, tackles a critical issue in the industry. This integration is set to bring significant improvements to the tour experience, offering crucial data directly to users in a user-friendly manner.

data.title: Garmin Fitness Sales Soar 42%, But Stock Cools After Record-Breaking Quarter
data.description: Garmin Ltd's stock dropped on Wednesday following the release of its fiscal first-quarter 2026 results. The company reported a 14% year-on-year increase in quarterly revenue to $1.75 billion, surpassing the analyst consensus of $1.72 billion. The adjusted earnings per share (EPS) stood at $2.08, exceeding the analyst consensus of $1.82. In terms of segment performance, the Fitness sector saw a revenue boost of 42% Y/Y to $546.82 million, driven by growth in all product categories, particularly advanced wearables. Outdoor revenue decreased by 5% Y/Y to $417.53 million, mainly due to tough comparisons with the prior-year product launch cycles. Aviation revenue witnessed an 18% Y/Y increase to $263.84 million, attributed to the OEM and aftermarket product categories. For more detailed information, the full story is accessible on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Fabric.AI Announces Ticker Symbol Change to “FABC” as It Advances AI Infrastructure Strategy and MicroLED Interconnect Development
data.description: In New York, NY on April 29, 2026, Fabric.AI, Inc. (Nasdaq: FABC), also known as Fabric. AI, disclosed that their common stock will now trade under the ticker symbol "FABC" on the Nasdaq Capital Market starting April 29, 2026. Fabric.AI is an AI infrastructure company focusing on developing innovative fabless semiconductor technologies for future "AI factories." This alteration in trading symbol marks a significant development for the company and its shareholders on the stock market.

data.title: Algorhythm Holdings Announces Launch of SemiCab’s Freight Network Forum
data.description: An upcoming online series will feature a panel of industry experts discussing the most recent happenings and obstacles in the freight logistics sector. The series aims to address crucial topics impacting the industry, with a focus on current trends and challenges. Joining the discussions will be leaders with extensive experience in the field, offering valuable insights and perspectives. This platform will provide a unique opportunity for professionals to stay informed about the latest developments in the freight logistics industry. Stay tuned to engage with these experts and gain valuable knowledge on the subject.

data.title: Stock Market Today: Dow Slips Ahead Of Fed Decision, Powell; Robinhood Plunges On Earnings (Live Coverage)
data.description: Today, the Dow Jones index experienced a decline as investors awaited the Federal Reserve's interest rate announcement and comments from Powell. Concurrently, Robinhood saw a substantial drop in its stock value. The market is closely monitoring these developments as they unfold, with live coverage available for updates on this situation.

data.title: Global Clean Energy Inc. Highlights Flamelit's Proven AI Delivery Across Public Sector, Healthcare, Security, and Data Infrastructure
data.description: On April 29, 2026, in Houston, Global Clean Energy, Inc. (OTCID: GCEI) emphasized the success of Flamelit, their AI platform, which is actively implementing production systems for clients in healthcare, public health, and security sectors. This technology has a strong track record in operation and is aiding numerous customers with its execution capabilities.
